title: MFH effect chain
description: One hand-authored effect chain (Wirkkette) for the storytelling page. Edit the values; do not rename the keys.

$schema.description: Keep this so the editor offers validation and auto-complete.

meta.description: Headline texts shown above and below the chain.

nodes.description: Each entry is one card in the chain.

id.description: Unique id used by edges. No spaces.

kind.description: Visual category: goal (green), law (amber), tech (blue), blockade (red).

row.description: Vertical order, top to bottom (1 = first).

col.description: left = path A, right = path B, center = shared step. On phones this also decides chat-bubble alignment.

tag.description: Small label on top of the card.

ref.description: Law / norm reference under the title.

modal.description: Content of the overlay opened when the card is clicked.

source.description: Reminder that the exact paragraph must be verified.

edges.description: Threads drawn between cards. Each edge is [fromId, toId] using node ids.
